prediction.reasoning: Based on ZTS's typical volatility of ~20% annually (1.2% daily std dev), the 6-day prediction incorporates sqrt(6) time scaling. The slight positive drift reflects ZTS's historical performance as a stable healthcare/animal health stock. Confidence intervals widen with higher confidence levels to account for increased uncertainty over the 6-day horizon.
